campaigns.notes: 4-9% conversion rate. Pool season. 125 historical conversions. Bid aggressively.

descriptions: Complete villa renovation in Dubai. Design, approvals, construction under one roof. No subcontractors. Free site visit. WhatsApp us.
Full villa renovation from AED 150K. Milestone payments. 3-year warranty. Daily WhatsApp updates. Book your free site visit today.

descriptions: Dubai home renovation experts. Kitchen, bathroom, full villa, pool. In-house team. Free consultation. WhatsApp today.
Home renovation from AED 30K. Daily WhatsApp updates. No hidden costs. Fixed quote. Milestone payments. Book free site visit.

campaigns.notes: Specific intent. High close rate. Average project AED 45-120K.

descriptions: Complete kitchen renovation in Dubai. Custom cabinetry, countertops, appliances, tiling, plumbing. In-house team. WhatsApp us.
Kitchen renovation with line-by-line AED pricing. No surprises. 3-year warranty. Free site visit today. Call now.

campaigns.notes: Specific intent. AED 18-65K projects. Often upsells to full villa renovation.

campaigns.name: Search - Apartment Renovation Dubai
campaigns.notes: Growing market. Downtown, Marina, Business Bay, JBR. Lower project value but high volume.

Apartment fit-out from AED 30K. Paint, flooring, kitchen, bathroom. Milestone payments. No hidden costs. WhatsApp us now.
